---
title: "NHM Living Labs Reports"
toc: true
---

This section contains reports on the implementation and development of NHM Living Labs, including Urban Research Station and Tring, covering infrastructure, methodologies, and research programmes.

## Published Protocols

- [Annual Tree Survey](reports/2_Published-Protocol_2025_Tree-Survey.qmd) — 2025 — Ed Baker, John Tweddle — *NHM Living Labs Reports* — Issue 2
- [Tree Tagging](reports/1_Published_Protocol_2025_Tree-Tagging.qmd) — 2025 — Ed Baker — *NHM Living Labs Reports* — Issue 1

## Implementation Reports

- [DS18B20 Thermometers](reports/3_Implementation-Report_DS18B20-Thermometers.qmd) — Ed Baker — *NHM Living Labs Reports* — Issue 3
